name: Stashpad Classic

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Stashpad Classic 0.102.17

Compatibility release: **Stashpad Classic now uses only APIs available in stable
Obsidian**, so it installs and runs on the current public desktop release and every
version back to 1.7 — no insider build required.

## What changed

- **Encryption fully removed.** All encryption features are gone — commands, the
  Encryption settings tab, folder/note context-menu options, archive-folder
  auto-encryption, the encrypted trash, and the OS-keychain (`secretStorage`)
  integration. Encryption was the feature most tied to newer/insider-only APIs.
- **No more newer-than-stable API usage.** Removed or reworked every call the
  community-plugin review flagged as newer than the plugin's supported Obsidian
  version (`secretStorage`, the async `workspace.revealLeaf` signature, and the
  1.13 declarative-settings `update()` refresh). Behavior is unchanged on the
  versions where those APIs existed; the plugin no longer *requires* them.
- **Safer HTML + cleaner source.** Cached note bodies re-hydrate through Obsidian's
  `sanitizeHTMLToDom` (no `createContextualFragment`), and a literal byte-order-mark
  in a regex is now escaped.

## Compatibility

`minAppVersion` stays at **1.7.0**, so Stashpad Classic installs on the widest range
of stable Obsidian — the current public desktop release and older — and will keep
working when 1.13 eventually reaches the stable channel.

> ⚠️ **Alpha software, AI-built.** The code was written by an AI assistant and is not
> human-audited. Keep backups. Please report anything that misbehaves.

releases.author: grub-basket
releases.description:
# Stashpad Classic 0.102.16

**The first release of Stashpad Classic** — a fork of Stashpad for **stable
(non-insider) Obsidian**.

Mainline Stashpad raised its `minAppVersion` to `1.13.0` (insider builds only) from
0.102.19 onward. Stashpad Classic is pinned at **0.102.16**, the last release that
still targets stable Obsidian (`minAppVersion 1.7.0`), so you can run it on a normal,
publicly released Obsidian.

## What's different from mainline 0.102.16

- **Encryption removed.** All encryption features are disabled in Classic — the
  lock/unlock commands, the Encryption settings tab, the folder and note
  context-menu options, archive-folder auto-encryption, and the encrypted trash.
  Encryption was the feature most tied to insider-only APIs, so Classic drops it.
- Everything else is the full Stashpad 0.102.16 feature set: chat-style nested notes,
  outliner navigation, fast search, tasks, per-folder templates, and one-click
  **Open Knowledge Format (OKF)** export.

## Install

Via [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat): add the beta plugin
`grub-basket/SP-Classic`. Or download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`
from this release into `.obsidian/plugins/stashpad-classic/` in your vault.

> ⚠️ **Alpha software, AI-built.** Stashpad does a lot and is young; the code was
> written by an AI assistant and is not human-audited. Keep backups. This is the
> first Classic build — please report anything that misbehaves on stable Obsidian.
